note: Three batched web-only changes: (A) Explorer block detail now shows the next_hash field above prev_hash. Computed client-side via getblockhash(b.height+1); if the block is the chain tip the field renders "null // tip". (B) PoPC Quick Start: "plain-English step-by-step guide" -> "easy step-by-step guide". (C) Protocol Registry: two new sections inserted after the PROTOCOL_CLAIM_V1 proposal and before the FUTURE ANTI-SPAM section: (C1) "How to register a SOST Protocol capsule" — step-by-step guide using the existing sost-cli open-note capsule flow (the same flow already used for the Trinity Kalgoorlie Phase 1 proof bundle). Shows the exact commands for binding the canonical SOST Protocol PoPC manifesto JSON to the SOST chain so the term is timestamped on-chain before any third party can claim it. (C2) "Registered capsules" — public list pre-populated with the Trinity Kalgoorlie Phase 1 proof bundle entry (block #8085, txid d68678b5..., capsule text "trinity-proof kalgoorlie_phase1 3a28a4b112fe95df") plus a pending row for the SOST Protocol PoPC manifesto v1 with the manifesto SHA-256 already computed and the planned capsule text shown. The pending row will be promoted to ON-CHAIN once the operator publishes the capsule on mainnet. (D) New file website/api/sost-protocol-popc-manifesto-v1.json — canonical, sorted-keys JSON containing the SOST Protocol PoPC definition, evidence links and disclaimer. Its SHA-256 is the binding hash referenced by the planned on-chain capsule. No consensus / scripts / src / schema changes.
